title: Clinostigma macrostachyum
taxonomy: Clinostigma macrostachyum is a species of palm tree in the family Arecaceae. It is a member of the genus Clinostigma, which is a group of palms that are endemic to the Pacific Island region. The family Arecaceae, also known as the palm family, is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that are found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The classification of Clinostigma macrostachyum is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Magnoliophyta, Class: Liliopsida, Order: Arecales, Family: Arecaceae, Genus: Clinostigma, Species: C. macrostachyum. This classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the palm family.
